← Recipes

Sesame Orange Tofu

with Roasted Green Beans & Sticky Rice

SERVINGS: 2(4) | COOK TIME: 30(40) MINS | SPICY 🌶

Remember to wash all produce.

Ingredients are listed for 2 servings. If you're making 4 servings, please double your ingredients by using both meal kit bags provided.

Ingredients

  • ½ cup quinoa speckled rice
  • 2 garlic cloves, peeled and minced
  • 1 navel orange, half juiced, half cut into wedges (divided)
  • 2 tbsp tamari
  • 2 tbsp turbinado sugar
  • 1 tbsp Sriracha 🌶
  • 6 oz green beans, trimmed
  • 10 oz organic extra firm tofu, patted dry and cut into 1-inch pieces
  • ¼ cup cornstarch
  • 1 tbsp white sesame seeds (divided)
  • 1 tbsp sesame oil
  • 2 scallions, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces

From your kitchen

  • 1 tsp + 1 tbsp vegetable oil
  • Salt
  • Pepper

Tools

  • Small saucepan with lid
  • Baking sheet
  • Large nonstick skillet

Directions

  1. Cook the rice — Preheat oven to 425°F. Add rice, 1 cup water, and a pinch of salt to small saucepan. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat to low, and cook until grains are tender and water is absorbed, 15 to 18 minutes. (4-serving meal: use 2 cups water)

  2. Prepare the orange sauce — Add garlic, orange juice, tamari, sugar, and Sriracha to medium bowl. Whisk orange sauce.

  3. Roast the green beans — Combine green beans, 1 tsp vegetable oil, and a pinch of salt and pepper on baking sheet and toss. Roast until tender and browned in places, 6 to 8 minutes. (4-serving meal: use 2 tsp vegetable oil)

  4. Crisp the tofu — Combine tofu, cornstarch, just 2 tsp sesame seeds, and a pinch of salt and pepper in large bowl and toss. Heat sesame oil and 1 tbsp vegetable oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add coated tofu and cook, stirring occasionally, until crispy and browned in places, 5 to 8 minutes. (4-serving meal: use 4 tsp sesame seeds, 2 tbsp vegetable oil) TIP: Work in batches for 4-serving meal.

  5. Add the sauce — Add scallion and cook until softened, 1 to 2 minutes. Reduce heat to low and add orange sauce. Toss to coat and cook until sauce thickens, about 30 seconds. TIP: For 4-serving meal, add all the tofu back to pan before adding scallion and sauce.

  6. Serve — Divide sticky rice and roasted green beans between large plates and top with sesame orange tofu. Sprinkle with remaining sesame seeds and serve with orange wedges. 好吃！

Nutrition

Nutrition per serving (as packaged) Calories: 690, Fat: 18 g, Sodium: 1180 mg, Carbohydrates: 102 g, Protein: 33 g.

Allergens: sesame, soy. Manufactured on equipment shared with tree nuts, peanut, sesame, wheat, soy, egg, milk, fish, and shellfish.

Recipe from Purple Carrot.

Recipe from Purple Carrot.
